portfolio_principal.bio: Helping brands and organizations connect with people through meaningful design
portfolio_principal.bio_extendida: Brazilian designer, artist and mother with over 15 years of experience. Helping brands, studios, and organizations tell their stories through human-centered design.

sobre.interesses: Collaborations with purpose-driven companies and NGOs
premios: Solo exhibition at Abreu Advogados, Lisbon (2021)
Works in public collections: MARGS and MACRS (Brazil)

formacao.titulo: MBA in Marketing, Branding and Growth

projetos.titulo: BMW Foundation: Mobility for Human Development Report
projetos.descricao: Report developed in partnership between BMW Foundation's RESPOND initiative and MIT Solve, based on insights from five expert-led workshops held globally. The project aimed to create a visually engaging report that embodied the concept of mobility while adhering to RESPOND's identity guidelines.
projetos.abordagem_visual: Expanding droplets symbolizing movement and decentralization. Includes a global trends map and detailed regional reports.

projetos.cliente: BMW Foundation Herbert Quandt Report team
projetos.descricao: The BMW Foundation's first impact report in a decade, showcasing how its investment portfolio contributes to pressing global challenges.
projetos.abordagem_visual: Dynamic visual concept with moving circles containing images of impact investments, metaphorically representing the continuous journey and cascading effect of the foundation's work.

projetos.titulo: BMW Foundation: Mind Maps for RISE SYNC Events
projetos.descricao: Transformation of 16 hours of breakout session discussions into visual mind maps, organizing Jamboard notes into affinity-structured visualizations aligned with the RISE pillars and UN SDGs.
processo: Organization of topics into thematic clusters
Final design using the RISE palette and official SDG colors

projetos.descricao: Creation of an original illustration for BMW Foundation's RISE Cities program, focusing on community-driven urban transformation in Munich's Bahnhofsviertel neighborhood, inspired by Barcelona's Superblock concept.
projetos.abordagem_visual: Illustration reflecting openness, collaboration, and the dynamic energy of urban regeneration.
projetos.uso: Communication and promotion of the RISE City Lab Munich event

projetos.cliente: Studio Gagliano (yoga studio, Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal)
projetos.descricao: Creation of a visual identity for a yoga studio located in the garden of the Boeira Garden Hotel, owned by Anna Gagliano, an instructor trained in India and England.
projetos.slogan_cliente: Yoga to restore, renew and rejuvenate
projetos.abordagem_visual: Ginkgo biloba leaf as the central symbol, representing peace, longevity, and resilience — a survivor of the atomic bombings in Japan. The shape of the leaf evokes a person with open arms.

projetos.cliente: Eixo (artistic residency startup, Mosteiró, Porto, Portugal)
projetos.descricao: Creation of a visual identity for an artistic residency startup with a mission to function as a cultural center outside the major hubs of Porto and Lisbon.
projetos.abordagem_visual: A colony of mushrooms as the central symbol, representing creativity and collective growth. A warm color palette conveying a welcoming atmosphere.

projetos.cliente: Gaioka (studio of Nicolle Maia, landscape architect with a Master's in Sustainable Architecture)
projetos.missao_cliente: Inspire change by planting the seed of sustainability through human-centered, nature-integrated projects
projetos.descricao: Modernization of the studio's visual identity while preserving its essence and original values.
projetos.abordagem_visual: Redesign of the Monstera Adansonii leaf, contemporary typographic update, watercolor illustration referencing scientific illustration.

projetos.descricao: Development of an infographic to communicate Papirus's recycled paper cycle in partnership with the Pólen certification body.
projetos.abordagem_visual: Fluid style evoking movement and connectivity, incorporating the Papirus logo ribbon to reinforce continuity and brand identity.

projetos.descricao: Creation of a visual identity for an independent musician, translating the emotional sensitivity of the compositions into a distinctive visual language.
projetos.abordagem_visual: A series of watercolor paintings illustrating the songs, poster/CD envelope design in an economical A4 format.

projetos.cliente: Cuco Produções (cultural production company, Porto Alegre, Brazil)
projetos.descricao: Development of a visual identity for a cultural production company, creating a vibrant logotype inspired by the cuckoo bird.
projetos.abordagem_visual: High-contrast black and yellow palette conveying vitality and communicative energy.

projetos.descricao: Campaign adaptation for the Portuguese market for the final season of The Walking Dead, working from provided visual assets (images and logo).
projetos.entregas_quantidade: Over 50 banners, pop-ups, and OOH materials

projetos.titulo: FOX Crime | My Life is a Murder
projetos.descricao: Promotional campaign for the series My Life is a Murder launched on FOX Crime in Portugal.
projetos.abordagem_visual: Composition using the New York City skyline (where the series is filmed) combined with launch photographs.
projetos.processo: One-shift deadline, following FOX Crime guidelines and creative director approval.

projetos.descricao: A drawing series created following a personal experience with insomnia during a stressful period. Submerged figures based on underwater photographs, suspended in the void, emphasizing the loneliness typical of insomnia.
exposicoes_publicacoes: UFCSPA Collection (Federal University of Health Sciences of Porto Alegre)
Artist Book published by Azulejo Arte Impressa
Exhibition at art fair in São Paulo (2016)
Published in newspapers and private residences

projetos.titulo: I wish I were a whale
projetos.descricao: A body of works exploring human migration as a systemic phenomenon, following relocation from Brazil to Portugal. Final project of the Master in Fine Arts at the University of Porto.
projetos.contexto: Derived from the performance 'Escuto Histórias de Imigrantes', presented at Lote67 (Porto), where the artist engaged with the narratives of 23 immigrants.
reconhecimentos: Solo exhibition at Abreu Advogados, Lisbon (2021)

projetos.titulo: When we made the ocean a river
projetos.titulo_pt: De quando fizemos do oceano rio
projetos.descricao: A poetic meditation on migration, connection, and the universal desire to belong. A utopian perspective of a world without borders, with migratory animals as the central motif, challenging the notion of borders as fixed constructs.
projetos.exposicao: Group show NE-SE (2018), Lugar do Desenho, Gondomar, Portugal

portfolio_arte.bio: Louise Kanefuku (Porto Alegre/BR, 1985) is an artist and designer with a Master's in Fine Arts from the University of Porto. Of Japanese immigrant descent, her work explores migration through drawing, shaped by her experience in Portugal (2017–2021).
premios: Arte Jovem Award 2020 (Fundação Millenium BCP, Lisbon)
Award winner at Porto Alegre salons

projetos_desenho.titulo: I wish I were a whale

projetos_desenho.descricao: A series exploring the relationship between the artist's body and situations of discomfort. Small figures based on photographs of the artist's own body in uncomfortable positions, arranged in compositions reminiscent of martyrdoms.
projetos_desenho.formato_especial: Artist's book (six volumes of the Barsa Encyclopedia)
projetos_desenho.texto_critico: Prof. Dr. Flávio Gonçalves — highlights the delicacy with which the images are treated and the artist's identity as a repeatable sign.

projetos_desenho.titulo: De quando fizemos do oceano rio
projetos_desenho.titulo_en: When we made the ocean a river

projetos_performance.titulo: Todas as pintas do meu corpo
projetos_performance.titulo_en: All the moles of my body
projetos_performance.descricao: A participatory work that distributes 134 individually packaged numbered paper moles to the audience. Each mole is unique and reproducible, individual and collective at the same time.
projetos_performance.conceito: Removal of the drawn line, leaving only dots — an allusion to children's dot-to-dot books. It questions our lack of awareness about the details of our own bodies.
projetos_performance.texto_critico: Charlene Cabral — '134 moles duly numbered and enveloped by Louise, distributed to the audience, each held in their importance, unique and collective at the same time.'

projetos_performance.titulo_en: Taking the line for a walk
projetos_performance.descricao: A performance in which the artist traces a chalk line from her home address to the Institute of Arts — a personal route she walked for years.
projetos_performance.conceito: It asks: 'What if, every time we walked, we left a line behind us?' The everyday commute becomes a visual and emotional record.

projetos_performance.titulo: Tudo o que meu corpo toca
projetos_performance.descricao: Documentation of every object the artist's body touched over the course of a full day, creating a list that makes visible the invisible trace of our daily interaction with the material world.
projetos_performance.exposicao: Projeto Garagem Aura, Galeria Aura, Porto Alegre
projetos_performance.texto_critico: Talitha Motter — 'The artist's proposition of noting everything her body touched in a day of existence induces possible narratives for that 24-hour period.'

projetos_performance.titulo: Work in regress. Atos de presença
projetos_performance.titulo_en: Work in regress. Acts of presence
projetos_performance.descricao: A video-performance in which the artist walks from home to work backwards. The everyday commute is recontextualized, transforming an automated routine into a conscious artistic gesture.
projetos_performance.conceito: To integrate artistic practice into a conventional professional life, using the body itself and displacement as creative material.

projetos_performance.descricao: A project that invites friends to have their silhouettes drawn in chalk on the walls of the city of Porto, responding to the perception that the city continuously receives and lets go of many people.
projetos_performance.conceito: Ephemeral marks in the urban landscape as a desire to fix memories of new friends.

projetos_performance.descricao: A performance that invites people to share their stories in individual encounters, inverting the traditional position of the artist as speaker. It creates 'a space in time that did not previously exist' between strangers with similar migration experiences.
projetos_performance.inspiracao: The work 'Ouvidoria' by actress Luciana Paz
localizacoes: Lote 67, Cedofeita Commercial Center (16 Mar – 6 Apr 2019)
projetos_performance.nota: No speech was recorded or shared
